note: Spec/plan hand-authored (spec-kitty CLI unavailable in the implementing environment); mirrors the existing report-i18n mission format. Implemented incrementally on branch ia/progressive-disclosure, one WP per commit/PR to main.
statTile delta+sparkline stat cell added and unit-tested (5 cases); additive, not yet wired into any page. npm run test:unit 232 pass; i18n:check clean.

Layer-1 landing page: scorecard hero + New/Fixed/Regressed delta strip (statTile) + biggest-win callout (rankBugs top-1, canonical link) + detail demoted to collapsed <details> drilldowns (h-summary/h-trends/h-wow anchors preserved). New src/lib/progress.js (finding-level weekDeltas from the ledger) unit-tested; wired through aggregate.js. Native <details>/links = works with JS off. npm run test:unit 238 pass; i18n:check clean (catalogs 526).

Progress panel: open-finding severity burndown chart (severityBurndown from the ledger, same accessible SVG+data-table pattern), clean-week streak badges (streaks()), a client-side triage-completion count (reads localStorage vital-triage:*, blank with JS off), and a Fixed-this-week list. progress.js burndown/streaks unit-tested; aggregate attaches burndown+streaks. delta labels registered in dynamic-strings.json; fr/ja/nl catalogs +13 (complete at 539). npm run test:unit 243 pass; i18n:check clean.

Outcome nav regroup + renames + redirect stubs. Central PAGES map + pageHref() (also applies locale suffix to cross-links, fixing a prior bug); subnav grouped under Accessible?/Fast?/Findable?/Trustworthy?/Sustainable? (labeled <ul> groups). Renamed accessibility->accessible, lighthouse->fast, readability->findable, third-party->third-parties; redirectStub() (canonical + meta-refresh + hash-preserving location.replace) written at every old basename per locale via the aggregate loop. Two translated strings' embedded hrefs migrated in catalogs; +Moved/+moved-notice strings (fr/ja/nl complete at 541). e2e SUBPAGES + i18n-render hrefs updated; new unit tests for redirectStub/PAGE_REDIRECTS/grouped-nav. Verified by a real npm run aggregate: latest week emits accessible[-fr].html + hash-preserving stubs at accessibility[-fr].html etc. npm run test:unit 246 pass; i18n:check clean. e2e still blocked at the Playwright scan step (pre-existing sandbox limitation), before any report assertions.

Docs: added an Information Architecture section to CLAUDE.md (three layers, deltas-everywhere/statTile, progress artifacts, one-canonical-location, outcome nav, and the PAGE_REDIRECTS hash-preserving redirect-stub invariant + old->new slug table) and a README design-principle on the outcome-oriented landing page. check:spec-kitty green.

WP01-WP05 implemented and verified on branch ia/progressive-disclosure (foundation merged via PR #200; landing/progress/nav to follow). npm run test:unit 246 pass, i18n:check + check:spec-kitty clean, real npm run aggregate confirms renamed pages + hash-preserving stubs (en+fr). test:e2e blocked at the Playwright scan step (pre-existing sandbox limitation).

Follow-up: finished the outcome mapping so each engine page maps 1:1 to a group. Split standardsSecuritySection into standardsSection (Web standards & metadata + PWA + social) rendered by standards.html under Findable?, and securitySection (Security & domain hygiene + public-interest signals) rendered by a new security.html (renderSecurityPage) under Trustworthy?. Added security to PAGES + SUBNAV_GROUPS; aggregate writes security[-loc].html. No rename of standards.html (no stub needed); new page has no prior URL. +Security/+Security & public interest strings (fr/ja/nl complete at 542), dropped the orphaned Standards & security heading. e2e SUBPAGES 11->12 + a security-page assertion; new unit test for the split. npm run test:unit 247 pass; i18n:check clean; real aggregate confirms security.html carries security+public-interest and standards.html no longer does.

Landing-page polish: New/Fixed/Regressed tiles now carry momentum sparklines (new deltaSeries() in progress.js reconstructs per-week counts from the final ledger's _weeks membership) and a tone class (stat-better when fixed>0, stat-worse when regressed>0). statTile gained an optional tone; aggregate attaches progress.deltaSeries. deltaSeries unit-tested; Layer-1 render test asserts sparklines+tone. npm run test:unit 249 pass; i18n:check clean.
